## Notes

- Extraction was interrupted when the IDA MCP server disconnected.
- The function list was collected from IDA DB session with Hex-Rays decompiler.
- To complete extraction: reconnect IDALIB MCP server and re-run extract_all.py.
- Script extract_all.py is ready for batch processing via idalib_analyze_batch.
